alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the phosphorus atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organophosphorus compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a chemical bond between a carbon atom and a fluorine atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organofluorides

alternative_parents.description: Organic neutral compounds having formal unit electrical charges of opposite sign.
alternative_parents.name: Organic zwitterions

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a sodium ion.
alternative_parents.name: Organic sodium salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl fluoride functional group with formula R-F , where R is an alkyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl fluorides

class.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metal atom in its ionic form.
class.name: Organic metal salts

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as organic metal halides. These are organic compounds containing metals and halogens. Some are ionic while others are covalently bonded.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing metals and halogens. Some are ionic while others are covalently bonded.
direct_parent.name: Organic metal halides

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing metals and halogens. Some are ionic while others are covalently bonded.
subclass.name: Organic metal halides

superclass.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
superclass.name: Organic salts
